infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to save where you parked.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is used to notify you when you arrive at your car.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to take a photo of your parking ticket.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ParkingReminder uses your location to notify you when you arrive at your car.

plugins.cameraPermission: ParkingReminder needs camera access to photograph your parking ticket.
